title: How Birding Apps Are Boosting Tourism in the World’s Top Bird Destination
summary_full: Colombia is home to the most species of birds known to ornithologists. Merlin, an app, is helping to build an “avian tourism” industry there.
summary_public: Colombia is home to the most species of birds known to ornithologists. Merlin, an app, is helping to build an “avian tourism” industry there.
